failure_signals.description: Current input features no longer resemble the reference distribution.
failure_signals.name: Data drift
failure_signals.recommended_action: Flag data pipeline drift and pause automatic forecast-based actions.

failure_signals.description: Current shifted data produces worse metrics than the reference data.
failure_signals.name: Model decay over time
failure_signals.recommended_action: Compare forecast residuals against current-distribution labels and retrain if confirmed.

failure_signals.description: Distance-based OOD scoring indicates current inputs are far from the training/reference region.
failure_signals.name: Out-of-distribution input
failure_signals.recommended_action: Block automation for OOD forecast contexts and request analyst review.

failure_signals.description: Conformal intervals or sets indicate high uncertainty around the model output.
failure_signals.evidence: Mean conformal interval width=14.4399; M2 RMSE=4.03.
failure_signals.name: Wide prediction interval
failure_signals.recommended_action: Report interval forecasts and avoid point-estimate-only automation.

failure_signals.description: Current shifted data produces worse metrics than the reference data.
failure_signals.evidence: MAE changed from 2.7868 to 3.8468 under shifted current data.
failure_signals.name: Model decay over time
failure_signals.recommended_action: Run retraining benchmark on current data before production use.

failure_signals.description: The model should not automatically act because multiple reliability warnings are active.
failure_signals.evidence: 4 major reliability conditions are active simultaneously.
failure_signals.name: Unsafe auto decision
failure_signals.recommended_action: Disable automatic forecast-triggered actions and escalate for review.

energy_timeseries.honest_scope: This profile explains reliability risk. It still does not execute repairs.

failure_signals.description: Current input features no longer resemble the reference distribution.
failure_signals.name: Data drift
failure_signals.recommended_action: Flag data pipeline drift and evaluate current cohort before automatic decisions.

failure_signals.description: Predicted probabilities are not well aligned with empirical frequencies.
failure_signals.name: Calibration failure
failure_signals.recommended_action: Apply recalibration or require calibrated probability reporting before deployment.

failure_signals.description: A meaningful fraction of decisions are made with weak model confidence.
failure_signals.name: Low-confidence prediction
failure_signals.recommended_action: Route low-confidence cases to human review or request more features.

failure_signals.description: The model should not automatically act because multiple reliability warnings are active.
failure_signals.evidence: 2 major reliability conditions are active simultaneously.
failure_signals.name: Unsafe auto decision
failure_signals.recommended_action: Disable automatic decisioning for affected slices and require human review.

healthcare_classification.honest_scope: This profile explains reliability risk. It still does not execute repairs.

honest_claim: Failure taxonomy and trust-score routing are implemented. No automated repair execution or self-healing claim yet.

m4_reliability_summary.m4_limitation: Signals are translated into taxonomy and routing recommendations, but repairs are not yet triggered.
